rationale: No new headline directly hits Portugal this cycle; elevated Iberian wildfire/drought risk from El Niño remains the dominant concern for a Portuguese resident, held at baseline.

top_events.title: Wildfire / climate risk in Iberia (ongoing)
top_events.summary: El Niño remains active; no new specific Iberian fire event this cycle but seasonal risk remains elevated heading into summer.

top_events.title: Trump claims Iran deal near, markets surge
top_events.summary: Potential easing of oil prices could marginally reduce energy costs in Portugal, but unconfirmed and indirect.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands on migration
top_events.summary: Pope highlights perilous Atlantic migration routes; relevant to Iberian/Atlantic context but no direct policy impact on Portugal.
